title: 1.1: Adds Zod `.transform()` calls in `schema.ts` that convert raw PEP 508 dependency strings into `PackageDependency` objects during schema validation, replacing the removed `DependencyListSchema` and `DependencyRecordSchema`
1.2: Exports `parsePyProject()` function from `extract.ts` with signature `(content: string, packageFile?: string) => PyProject | null`
1.3: Removes all calls to and the import of `parseDependencyList` from both processors that use it (hatch.ts and uv.ts)
1.4: Removes all calls to and the import of `parseDependencyGroupRecord` from `pdm.ts`
1.5: Replaces the `is.nullOrUndefined(def)` check with an idiomatic nullish check in `extract.ts`

1.6: Replaces all 7 `is.nullOrUndefined(...)` checks with idiomatic nullish checks only in `pdm.ts` (pdm, pdmSource, project.tool?.pdm, existingLockFileContent, dep.managerData?.depGroup twice, packagesByCMD[commandPrefix])
1.7: Replaces all 3 `is.nullOrUndefined(...)` checks with idiomatic nullish checks in `uv.ts` (uv, existingLockFileContent, uv_indexes)

1.8: Adds `.catch()` to all 16 schema fields in `schema.ts` for graceful error recovery (project, build-system, dependency-groups, tool, requires-python, dependencies, optional-dependencies, pixi, pdm, hatch, uv, version, build-backend, build-system.requires, PdmSchema.dev-dependencies, UvSchema.dev-dependencies)
1.9: Removes both calls to `parseDependencyList` from `extractPackageFile()` in `extract.ts` (for project.dependencies and build-system.requires)
1.10: Removes both calls to `parseDependencyGroupRecord` from `extractPackageFile()` in `extract.ts` (for dependency-groups and optional-dependencies)
3.1: Removes all 3 obsolete functions (parseDependencyList, parseDependencyGroupRecord, and parsePyProject) from `utils.ts`
